report.summary: Latest commit (e3f63fc) shipped 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, and stablecoin yield tracker with clean metadata; defi-yields API route lacks caching/fallback (critical); 108 published slugs still missing page.tsx files.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 4 new learn guides (staking, Euler V2, flash loans, Hyperlane) all pass QA: metadata exports, JSON-LD structured data, no use-client conflicts
Stablecoin yield tracker correctly splits server page.tsx (metadata) from client component — no build risk
TypeScript check: 15 errors in structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in .ts file) — non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors: true, but should be renamed to .tsx
108 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES have no matching page.tsx — these return 404 and waste crawl budget
Live site verification skipped — degen0x.com blocked by network egress proxy this cycle

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: prices: Healthy — 60s TTL, stale fallback, proper Cache-Control + X-Cache-Source headers
trending: Healthy — 5m TTL, stale fallback, Cache-Control headers present
fear-greed: Minor issue — 10m TTL and stale fallback work, but error path missing Cache-Control and X-Cache-Source headers
market-metrics: Healthy — 60s TTL, mock data fallback, uses X-Cache instead of X-Cache-Source (cosmetic inconsistency)
market-dominance: Best practice — 5m TTL, dual fallback (stale + hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA), proper headers
CRITICAL: defi-yields has NO in-memory cache and NO fallback data — if DefiLlama goes down, this route returns raw errors to users

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: e3f63fc (2026-04-02 13:24:06) — 95 files changed, 10974 insertions, 644 deletions
Build config: ignoreBuildErrors: true masks the structured-data.examples.ts TS errors — build should pass on Vercel
Could not verify live deployment status — degen0x.com blocked by egress proxy; recommend manual check on Vercel dashboard
No uncommitted changes in working tree

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: 4 learn guides (staking, Euler V2, flash loans, Hyperlane), stablecoin yield tracker tool, 8 new OG images, published pages list update
634 pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES, only 2 remaining in PUBLISH_QUEUE (impermanent-loss guide, Hyperliquid guide)
108 published slugs still have no page.tsx — these are phantom entries that should either get pages built or be removed from PUBLISHED_PAGES
Blockers for Jefe: (1) defi-yields API needs caching/fallback urgently, (2) structured-data.examples.ts needs .tsx rename, (3) 108 phantom published slugs need resolution
